title: rhododendron reticulatum subsp. ciliatum
intro: Rhododendron reticulatum subsp. ciliatum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron reticulatum subsp. ciliatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
